evaluation.criteria: Score 10: Table lists all four correct companies (UnitedHealth Group, Broadcom, Citigroup, XPeng) with accurate revenue figures (within 2% of official filings), correct key executives (Witty, Tan, Fraser, He), and distinct facts (Optum scale, Singapore hub, First female CEO/Rev vs Goldman, VW investment).
